name: Avocado & Grapefruit Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the avocado into 8 wedges.
2. Arrange equal amounts of avocado and grapefruit on four salad dishes.
3. Top each dish with 2 slices of onion.
4. Dress each salad with 1 tablespoon of poppy seed dressing.
Food Exchanges per serving: 1 Fruit Exchange + 1 Fat Exchange; CAL: 137, CHO: 0mg; CAR: 3g; PRO: 17mg; SOD: 109; FAT: 10g.
